<p class="key-answer" data-question="Ipilimumab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Ipilimumab</strong> 目前有 <strong>23 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Ipilimumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：MelanomaYervoy as monotherapy or combination with nivolumab is indicated for the treatment of advanced (unresectable or metastatic) melanoma in adults and adolescents 12 years of age and older (see...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>metastatic melanoma（99.3%）</li>
<li>choroideremia（99.1%）</li>
<li>non-cutaneous melanoma（99.0%）</li>
<li>epithelioid cell melanoma（99.0%）</li>
<li>eyelid melanoma（99.0%）</li>
<li>scrotum melanoma（98.8%）</li>
<li>nodular malignant melanoma（98.6%）</li>
<li>malignant melanoma of the mucosa（98.6%）</li>
<li>acral lentiginous melanoma (disease)（98.6%）</li>
<li>lentigo maligna melanoma（98.6%）</li>
<li>balloon cell malignant melanoma（98.6%）</li>
<li>amelanotic skin melanoma（98.6%）</li>
<li>CDK4 linked melanoma（98.6%）</li>
<li>superficial spreading melanoma（98.6%）</li>
<li>choroidal dystrophy, central areolar（98.5%）</li>
<li>intestinal obstruction in the newborn due to guanylate cyclase 2C deficiency（98.3%）</li>
<li>male infertility due to gonadal dysgenesis（94.5%）</li>
<li>46,XY disorder of gonadal development（94.3%）</li>
<li>gonadal dysgenesis（89.8%）</li>
<li>severe combined immunodeficiency due to LCK deficiency（87.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/ipilimumab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
